name: Chicken Dijon Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chicken breast, cooked and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions.
2. In a medium bowl, combine yogurt, wheat germ, white wine vinegar, Dijon mustard, and black pepper. Mix well.
3. Add the cooked pasta and remaining ingredients (chicken breast, broccoli florets, tomato, and red onion). Toss until everything is evenly coated.
4. Serve immediately or chill before serving.
5. Before serving, sprinkle with additional wheat germ for added crunch.
